title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal portfolio website for DSC 106 featuring reusable JavaScript components, project templating from JSON, and live GitHub API stats.

title: CSCI 210 Final Project
description: Final project repository for CSCI 210, built in Python and structured as a larger end-to-end course project.

title: League of Legends Gameplay Analysis
description: DSC 80 project analyzing gameplay data from League of Legends to explore patterns and player behavior.

title: Linked Out
description: Web project focused on building a social or professional networking style experience with front-end development tools.

title: Anime Recommender
description: Python recommendation project that suggests anime titles by modeling user preferences and similarity across shows.

title: Calorie Expenditure Prediction
description: Machine learning project using supervised models to predict calorie expenditure from structured exercise and health data.

title: Wage Timer
description: C++ project that tracks time and wage-related calculations, combining core programming logic with practical utility.

title: Python Heart
description: Small Python project exploring creative programming and visual output through code.

title: GitHub Pages Site
description: GitHub Pages website repository for publishing web content and experimenting with static site deployment.

title: Predicting Esports Match Outcomes
description: Data science project focused on predicting match outcomes in esports using historical game and team performance data.

title: Image Processing and Classification Program
description: Builds a basic image processing system and a simple machine learning classifier from scratch, including transformations and K-nearest neighbors image classification.

title: MTS Transit Visualization
description: Visualizes San Diego's bus network, simulates bus arrivals and passenger wait times, and compares real transit patterns to theoretical models.
